text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: Big science. Bold ideas. In just one minute, our scientists break down complex concepts and share how discovery moves from idea to impact.

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: What are multispecific antibodies? In this One Minute Thesis, watch scientist Jennifer Stone explain how they’re being used to discover potential new treatment approaches for cancer and immune diseases.

video.name: Video
video.overlayDescription: What are biostimulatory fillers? Watch Charlie Hee, PhD, explain the science of aging skin in this One Minute Thesis.

video.name: Video
video.overlayDescription: What are antibody-drug conjugates (ADCs)? Watch scientist Emily Faivre explain how ADCs work in this One Minute Thesis.

video.name: Video
video.overlayDescription: Hear Alessandra Welker, PhD, explain how shuttle technology can help unlock new possibilities for treating neurological disorders and deliver medicines through the blood-brain barrier.

video.name: Video
video.overlayDescription: How are we using artificial intelligence to help design new medicines faster? Watch Christopher Negron, PhD, explain in this One Minute Thesis.

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: From quick insights to in-depth stories, explore how our scientists and the use of new modalities and technologies are helping shape the future of medicine.

custom_title.name: Custom Title
custom_title.title: Join the team working to transform patient care
